description:
All your chats in one app. Yes, really.

A single app to chat on iMessage, WhatsApp, and 13 other chat networks. You can search, snooze, or archive messages. And with a unified inbox, you’ll never miss a message again.
✨ New
- New themes available in Settings > Appearance
- Mentions of your name are specially highlighted in chat messages

🛠️ Fixed & Improved
- Pinned chats should not become un-pinned on relaunch any more
- Linux: Fixed ability to record audio and voice notes
- Fixed unread counts for Discord DMs and servers
- Telegram appears as an option to start a chat with a phone number
- Facebook login is more reliable
- Improved reliability of "Delay notifications for..." setting
- Settings should not revert any more when you change them too quickly
